title: 6 Stocks That Have Outperformed Apple This Year
text: Apple actually isn't the best performer in the S&P 500 so far this year.

title: Betting Against the Market: 3 Stocks at Risk as Short Bets Reach a One-Year High
text: The stock market has been surging lately. And, in conjunction, stocks at risk of short selling are also rising as traders look to take advantage of overpriced securities.

title: ON Semiconductor: Multi-Decade Growth In Silicon Carbide And Electrification
text: ON Semiconductor is well-positioned to capitalize on the growth of the electric vehicle (EV) market, with a broad portfolio of solutions and a focus on high-growth automotive and industrial sectors. The company is targeting a 70% CAGR for silicon carbide (SiC) solutions from 2022 to 2027 and expects a sales growth CAGR of 10-12% during the same period. ON Semiconductor receives a "Strong Buy" rating, with a fair value stock price estimate of $124.

title: Post-Nvidia Boom: 3 Potential Windfall Stocks Ready to Surge
text: This year's price action in the markets has been dominated by the performance of a handful of stocks including Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA ). Notably, the company has provided significant gains for index investors with their stock absolutely skyrocketing higher on the back of surging interest in artificial intelligence and the company's high-performance chips that power the sector.

title: Is It Too Late to Buy Top EV Stock Onsemi?
text: Onsemi has been on a roll as investor optimism builds for the EV market. By some measures, this stock has gotten a bit overpriced as it spends to increase manufacturing capacity.

title: 5 Things to Know Before Markets Open
text: The European Central Bank is expected to keep hiking interest rates and initial jobless claims are expected to drop lower. Here's what investors need to know today.

title: onsemi Selected by Nasdaq for 100 Index
text: SCOTTSDALE, Ariz.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--onsemi (Nasdaq: ON), a leader in intelligent power and sensing technologies, will be added to the Nasdaq-100 Index® prior to market open on Tuesday, June 20, 2023. The inclusion comes after two consecutive years of record results, tripling the company's market cap over the last 30 months. title: These 2 Nasdaq Stocks Hit All-Time Record Highs Friday
text: The Nasdaq kept gaining ground on Friday. ON Semiconductor has benefited from EVs and the move toward autonomous vehicle technology.

title: ON Semiconductor: Revenue Growth Decelerated, But I Like The Valuation
text: ON Semiconductor has demonstrated impressive revenue growth and expanding profitability over the last decade, making it an attractive investment opportunity. The company is well-positioned to benefit from the shift to electric vehicles and increased industrial digitalization, with strong relationships with automotive giants. Despite potential risks such as economic downturns and geopolitical tensions, ON stock is undervalued and offers significant upside potential.

title: Buy These 3 Top-Ranked ETFs and Never Sell
text: Investors seeking long-term growth and diversification often turn to Exchange-Traded Funds (ETFs) as a reliable investment option. With their unique advantages, ETFs have gained popularity among both seasoned investors and those new to the market.
